zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Langston III於1429年出生在英國奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德時，他的父親John Langston II23歲，母親Elizabeth Denton22歲。他於1449年與Amicia Danvers在英國英格蘭奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在英國奧可福爾被列為sheriff of oxfordshire。他去世於1506年9月9日在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Langston III于1429年出生在英国奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德时，他的父亲John Langston II23岁，母亲Elizabeth Denton22岁。他于1449年与Amicia Danvers在英国英格兰奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在英国奧可福爾被列为sheriff of oxfordshire。他去世于1506年9月9日在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾卡維斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Langston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places, for example Langstone in Devon and Hampshire, named with Old English lang ‘long, tall’ + stān ‘stone’, i.e. a menhir.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Langston III was born in 1429, in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, his father, John Langston II, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Denton, was 22. He married Amicia Danvers in 1449, in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff of oxfordshire in Oxfordshire, England. He died on 9 September 1506, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Langston III est né en 1429, à Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Langston II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Denton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Amicia Danvers en 1449, à Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of oxfordshire à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1506, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Langston III 1429 in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Langston II 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Denton 22. Er hat 1449 in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Amicia Danvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of oxfordshire in Oxfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. September 1506 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Langston III è nato il nel 1429 nel Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Langston II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Denton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Amicia Danvers nel 1449, nel Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of oxfordshire nel Oxfordshire, England. Morì il 9 settembre 1506, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Caversfield, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Langston IIIが1429年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバースフィールドで生まれた時，父John Langston IIは23歳，母Elizabeth Dentonは22歳であった。1449年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバースフィールドでAmicia Danversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of oxfordshireと記録されている。彼は1506年9月9日に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアカバースフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Langston III(이)가 1429년 영국 스퍼드실르 카버스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Langston II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Denton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 카버스필드에서 Amicia Danvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스퍼드실르에서 sheriff of oxfordshire이었다. 그는 1506년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 카버스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Langston III nasceu em 1429, em Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Langston II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Denton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia Danvers em 1449, em Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of oxfordshire em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1506, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Langston III родился в 1429 г. в местности кавирсфиелд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Langston II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Denton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia Danvers в 1449 г. в местности кавирсфиелд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of oxfordshire в местности оксфордшир, Англия. Он умер 9 сентября 1506 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности кавирсфиелд, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Langston III nació en 1429, en Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Langston II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Denton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Amicia Danvers en 1449, en Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of oxfordshire en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1506, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Caversfield, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
